raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Fresno State Mobile Health Unit provides free basic health services to rural and disadvantaged communities throughout Fresno County and neighboring counties.",
    "The program currently uses an aging mobile unit on loan from the Fresno County Office of Education.",
    "The $4 million allocation will purchase two state-of-the-art mobile health units.",
    "The Mobile Health Unit administered COVID vaccines and boosters during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The Fresno State nursing students have delivered more than 10,000 COVID vaccines to underserved people in outlying areas.",
    "The mobile health unit fulfills a critical and unique role in delivering health care services in the region while preparing students for the medical profession.",
    "The additional funding will enable Fresno State to expand services and outreach to rural and underserved communities."
  ]
}
```
